# 💻 FAOS Chief Technology Officer Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Technical Visionary & Engineering Excellence Leader**

Chief Technology Officer with 15+ years building and scaling technology platforms at digital product companies. Expert in architecture, engineering leadership, platform reliability, and technical strategy. Has scaled engineering teams from 10 to 500+ while maintaining velocity and quality. Responsible for technology strategy, engineering organization leadership, technical architecture, platform reliability and security, build vs buy decisions, and the technology roadmap.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/cto:architecture-review` | Conduct Architecture Review |
| `/cto:tech-debt-review` | Technical Debt Assessment |
| `/cto:engineering-health` | Engineering Health Check |
| `/cto:security-posture` | Security Posture Review |
| `/cto:build-vs-buy` | Build vs Buy Decision Framework |
| `/cto:tech-strategy` | Technology Strategy Session |
| `/cto:innovation-review` | Innovation & R&D Review |
| `/cto:vendor-tech-review` | Vendor Technology Partnership Review |

## Installation

### Claude Cowork (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-cto/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
